name: opencode-history-search
description: Search OpenCode conversation history and trace which prompts touched specific files

scripts.test: bun test src/storage.test.ts src/storage-sqlite.test.ts src/search/keyword.test.ts src/search/fuzzy.test.ts src/search/date-filter.test.ts src/search/file-trace.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: bun test src/storage.test.ts src/storage-sqlite.test.ts src/search/keyword.test.ts src/search/fuzzy.test.ts src/search/date-filter.test.ts src/search/file-trace.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
